call_id.description: 3CX MainCallHistoryId (preferred) or CallHistoryId. Primary key for incremental syncs.

caller_number.description: External or internal phone number of the caller.

queue_name.description: Always NULL on this stream — queue assignments are tracked separately in queue_performance_overview.

agent_extension.description: 3CX extension number of the agent on this call (destination DN for Inbound, source DN for Outbound).

start_time.description: Cursor field for incremental syncs. ISO 8601 with Z suffix (UTC).

end_time.description: Always NULL — 3CX's GetCallLogData OData function does not return a call-end timestamp. Compute downstream from start_time + duration_seconds if needed.

duration_seconds.description: Total call duration in seconds: ringing + talking time.

talk_time_seconds.description: Talking duration only, in seconds. Excludes ringing.

is_answered.description: Whether the call was answered. Maps to 3CX 'Answered'.

raw_talking_duration.description: Original 3CX ISO 8601 duration string (e.g. 'PT3M12.139836S'). Preserved for audit; the integer talk_time_seconds is derived from this.
